Stories.description: We honor the artisanal process and the deep meaning behind each creation. Because every object is a fragment of Mexico's history.

story-barro-negro.title: The Soul of Black Clay
story-barro-negro.excerpt: Discover the ancient process of San Bartolo Coyotepec, where the earth transforms into obsidian by the hands of artisans.
story-barro-negro.content:
# The Soul of Black Clay

Black clay is more than a technique; it is a heritage pulsating in the heart of Oaxaca. In San Bartolo Coyotepec, master artisans transform local clay into pieces of profound, metallic elegance.

## The Process
The secret lies in the **burnishing** and **baking**. Using a quartz stone, the artisan polishes the piece before it enters the two-mouth kiln. The smoke trapped during firing imparts that intense and mystical black hue, requiring no glazes.

## Living Heritage
Every curve and fretwork tells a story of patience. There is no rush in the workshop; the earth dictates the timing, and the artisan simply listens.

Heritage.title: Yollotl: The Heartbeat That Defines Us
Heritage.philosophy: In the ancient world of Anáhuac, the heart was not merely an organ; it was the 'Yollotl', the epicenter of knowledge, bravery, and creativity. For the Mexica, the heart is where a person's essence resides, providing the force that brings life to an artisan's hands.
Heritage.culturalValue: Casa Yolotl & Co. is born from this heartbeat. We do not merely offer craftsmanship; we preserve Mexican cultural value by bridging ancestral wisdom with contemporary business discipline, ensuring every piece bridges a glorious past and a purposeful future.
